projectDescription: A TypeScript monorepo providing a CLI, SDK, and plugin libraries for programmatically creating and managing Civilization VII mods.
keyFeatures: TypeScript SDK with strongly-typed builders for units, civilizations, constructibles, progression trees, and more
CLI tool (civ7) for crawling XML game resources and visualizing dependency graphs
Graph visualization with Graphviz WebAssembly rendering and interactive HTML viewer
Resource archive management (zip/unzip) with profile-based configuration
Mod management via git subtree for importing and syncing external mod repositories
Comprehensive game constants (units, abilities, effects, terrain, resources) for IntelliSense support
Built-in localization support for multiple languages
Monorepo workspace with Turbo build orchestration and Bun package management
publicApiSurface: Mod class - main mod orchestrator
UnitBuilder - create custom units with stats, costs, and abilities
CivilizationBuilder - define new civilizations with unique traits
CivilizationUnlockBuilder - set civilization-specific unlocks
LeaderUnlockBuilder - configure leader bonuses and abilities
ConstructibleBuilder - create buildings and improvements
UniqueQuarterBuilder - design unique districts
ProgressionTreeBuilder - build civic and tech trees
TraditionBuilder - add new policy cards
ModifierBuilder - create game modifiers and effects
ImportFileBuilder - import SQL files and custom assets
XmlFile - XML file generation with action groups
DatabaseNode - aggregate multiple node types
civ7 data crawl <seed> - crawl XML resources and output dependency graph
civ7 data explore <seed> - one-shot crawl + render + interactive viewer
civ7 data render <input> - render DOT file to SVG
civ7 data slice <manifest> - copy files from manifest to destination
civ7 data zip <profile> - create archive of game resources
civ7 data unzip <profile> - extract resource archive
civ7 mod git import/pull/push/status - manage mod repositories via git subtree
civ7 mod manage list/deploy - manage local mod folders
